notes: File constructs the relative p-Frobenius isogeny F_{E/k}: E → E^{(p)} end-to-end (coefficient twist, coord-ring hom, function-field pullback, point map, packaged Isogeny), with zero sorries and no maxHeartbeats overrides. The longest proof (frobeniusRelativeCoordRingHom_injective, 79 lines) mirrors the mulByInt_coordHom_injective pattern from the project using degree_norm_smul_basis. The Conditional namespace contains two identity stubs for Silverman II.2.12 that carry the separable-factor hypothesis without proving it, explicitly marking the upstream dependency on Worker C content.
